posts.author: Francesco.ANGIUS (Francesco ANGIUS)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would know if it’s possible to add a filter on the column “contacts” (linked between contacts and accounts) for the companies i created so i can only see one tab of the contacts and not all the contacts from “default tab”

If it’s not clear let me know so i can try to give more details … sorry for my english i’m french !
